name: markmap

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written parser when you need to turn a Markdown outline into a collapsible, zoomable mind-map data tree, because native implementations fail to preserve heading hierarchy, lists, and inline rich-text semantics reliably.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can write Markdown but cannot reliably convert a Markdown AST into the markmap hierarchy tree or collect content-dependent rendering assets such as KaTeX/highlight; this entry turns AI's native language directly into data consumable by markmap-view.

data_in.note: The primary structural term follows picks as hierarchy; the component's actual entry point is a Markdown string. Transformer.transform produces the hierarchy root, features, and normalized content exactly; it does not accept a prebuilt tree.

schema.markdown: string -- Markdown heading/list outline; an empty string is a valid empty state

when_to_use: 需要把 Markdown 大纲变成可折叠、可缩放思维导图的数据树时用它而非手写解析器,因为原生在稳定保留标题层级、列表与内联富文本语义上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认能写 Markdown,但做不到稳定的 Markdown AST→markmap 层级树转换,也无法可靠收集 KaTeX/highlight 等按内容启用的渲染资产;本条把 AI 母语直接变成 markmap-view 可消费的数据。

data_in.note: 主结构词按 picks 取 hierarchy;组件实际入口是 Markdown 字符串,Transformer.transform 精确产出层级 root、features 与规范化 content,不接收预造树。
data_in._why_no_example: Markdown 是 AI 原生记法,字段精确且无深 config,schema 足矣、不附 minimal example。

schema.markdown: string —— Markdown 标题/列表大纲;空字符串是合法空态

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接挂载或渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;它只负责转换,显示由 markmap-view 完成。

outputs.root: IPureNode —— markmap-view 的原生层级输入,节点含 content、children 与 payload
outputs.features: Record<string, boolean> —— 本次转换实际用到的插件特性
outputs.assets: {styles, scripts} —— transformer.getUsedAssets(features) 返回的按需资产

peer.note: 消费者是 markmap-view:先创建 SVG,再调用 Markmap.create(svg, options, root);本条自身不渲染。

boot.note: 保守主路径只做转换。markmap-lib 内含 markmap-view 依赖但不自动 mount;含公式或代码高亮时必须处理 assets,纯标题/列表通常无需额外资产。

owner_note: pick 合并 data-explore 与 browse-compare;本条以 data-explore 为 owner,两场景共用同一转换 primitive。

isolation.evidence: Headless transform primitive (markdown-it based). transform() is string→IPureNode data; getUsedAssets() RETURNS asset descriptors (IAssets{styles,scripts}) as plain data — it does not inject them. On the transform path there is no mount/render, no DOM/style/event side effect (the bundled markmap-view code is not executed unless Markmap.create is called, which this entry never does). Fully shadow-safe; any shadow concern belongs to the downstream markmap-view consumer, not this package.
